Figure 19: Improvement performances for BoolQ compared to smaller models

Figure 20: Coverage curves on CoLA using BERT-small models. Undercoverage and classwise calibration perform as poorly as BERT-tiny models.
Figure 17: Classwise and aggregate coverage curves for BERT-tiny on MNLI. All classes are well calibrated and closely follow the diagonal, indicating robust conformal validity.
Figure 8: Classwise coverage curves for CoLA using the NM2 prior method. Both BERT-tiny and RoBERTabase show persistent undercoverage, particularly for the “unacceptable” class.
Figure 9: Classwise coverage curves for BoolQ using BERT-tiny with two prior methods. Both NM2 and Vanilla NN fail to maintain valid coverage, especially for the “false” class.
